description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On September 26, 2024 at 1:21 AM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle (“Waymo AV”) operating in San Francisco, California was in a 
collision involving a bus on Potrero Avenue at 23rd Street. 
 
The Waymo AV was stopped facing a red light in the rightmost lane of northbound Potrero Avenue at the intersection with 23rd street. 
While the Waymo AV remained stopped at the red light, a bus traveling directly behind the Waymo AV maneuvered into the left adjacent 
lane. As the bus proceeded alongside the stopped Waymo AV and came to a stop at the red light, the passenger side of the bus made contact 
with the rear driver side corner of the Waymo AV. At the time of the impact, the Waymo AV’s Level 4 ADS was engaged in autonomous 
mode. Both vehicles sustained damage. 
Print
Clear Form
